ActivateExploreForward: Activate explore forward (我要探索前进)
ActivateTraceBack: Activate trace back (我要循迹后退)
AdaptiveHeight: Toggle adaptive height (打开|关闭自适应高度)
AdjustAbsoluteValue: Adjust 【音区】 absolute value (控制车辆【音区】绝对值调节功能)
AdjustAirConditionerAbsoluteValueTempera: Adjust 【音区】 air conditioner temperature absolute value (控制车辆【音区】空调温度绝对值调节功能)
AdjustAirConditionerExtremeValueTemperat: Adjust 【音区】 air conditioner temperature extreme value (控制车辆【音区】空调温度极值调节功能)
AdjustAirConditionerRelativeValueTempera: Adjust 【音区】 air conditioner temperature relative value (控制车辆【音区】空调温度相对值调节功能)
AdjustAirVentElectricAbsoluteValue: Adjust 【音区】 electric air vent absolute value (控制车辆【音区】电动出风口绝对值调节功能)
AdjustAirVentElectricExtremeValue: Adjust 【音区】 electric air vent extreme value (控制车辆【音区】电动出风口极值调节功能)
AdjustAirVentElectricRelativeValue: Adjust 【音区】 electric air vent relative value (控制车辆【音区】电动出风口相对值调节功能)
AdjustAirflowAirConditionerExtremeValue: Adjust 【音区】 air conditioner airflow extreme value (控制车辆【音区】空调风量极值调节功能)
AdjustAirflowAirConditionerMode: Adjust 【音区】 air conditioner airflow mode (控制车辆【音区】空调风量模式调节功能)
AdjustAirflowAirConditionerRelativeValue: Adjust 【音区】 air conditioner airflow relative value (控制车辆【音区】空调风量相对值调节功能)
AdjustAlarm: Adjust speed limit alarm mode (控制车辆限速报警方式调整功能)
AdjustConcentrationAbsoluteValueFragranc: Adjust fragrance concentration absolute value (控制车辆香氛浓度绝对值调节功能)
AdjustConcentrationExtremeValueFragrance: Adjust fragrance concentration extreme value (控制车辆香氛浓度极值调节功能)
AdjustConcentrationModeFragrance: Adjust fragrance concentration mode (控制车辆香氛浓度模式调节功能)
AdjustConcentrationRelativeValueFragranc: Adjust fragrance concentration relative value (控制车辆香氛浓度相对值调节功能)
AdjustCushionTilt: Adjust cushion tilt to highest/lowest (坐垫倾斜角度调到最高/最低)
AdjustE1: Set energy recovery to auto (动力回收设置为自动)
AdjustEntertainmentAngle: Adjust second row entertainment screen angle (二排娱乐屏角度调大|二排娱乐屏往外|二排娱乐屏角度调小|二排娱乐屏往里|二排娱乐屏角度调到最大|二排娱乐屏角度调到最小)
AdjustHUD: Toggle HUD adjustment page (打开/关闭HUD调节页面)
AdjustHUDAngle: Adjust HUD angle to maximum/minimum (HUD角度调到最大/最小)
AdjustHUDBrightness: Adjust HUD brightness to highest/lowest (HUD亮度调到最高/最低)
AdjustHUDHeight: Adjust HUD height up/down (HUD往上/往下/向上/向下)
AdjustMode: Set maintenance mode (雨刮竖立，处于维修模式，便于维修雨刮，无方向默认前雨刮)
AdjustMode29: Switch to previous/next driving mode (上一个/下一个驾驶模式)
AdjustMultiple: Adjust sunroof to 50% (【前/后/全部】天幕开到50%)
AdjustMultipleExtremeValue: Adjust sunroof to maximum/minimum (【前/后/全部】天幕开到最大/最小)
AdjustMultipleRelativeValue: Adjust sunroof opening (【前/后/全部】天幕开大/开小一点)
AdjustRearScreenPosition: Adjust rear screen position forward/backward (后排屏位置向前/向后调节)
AdjustRearWing: Set rear wing to high/medium/low (尾翼调节为高/中/低)
AdjustRow2Entertainment: Adjust second row entertainment screen position to X% (二排娱乐屏前后调到X%)
AdjustSeatAngle: Adjust 【前排/后排/左侧/右侧/全车】 seat angle to highest/lowest (【前排/后排/左侧/右侧/全车】座椅移到最高/最低)
AdjustSeatHeight: Adjust 【前排/后排/左侧/右侧/全车】 seat height to highest/lowest (【前排/后排/左侧/右侧/全车】座椅移到最高/最低)
AdjustSeatPage: Toggle seat adjustment page (打开/关闭座椅调节页面)
AdjustSeatSlide: Adjust 【前排/后排/左侧/右侧/全车】 seat forward/backward (【前排/后排/左侧/右侧/全车】座椅往前/往后一点)
AdjustSideMirror: Adjust side mirror up/down/left/right (后视镜向上/下/左/右调节一点)
AdjustSoundEffectModeSpace: Adjust sound effect mode (1、当前在播放全景声/全车沉浸环统音效/2D环绕音效开启)
AdjustSpeedCompensatedVolume: Close speed compensated volume (关闭音量随速调节)
AdjustSteeringWheelFrontRear: Adjust steering wheel forward/backward (方向盘往前/往后移+一点/百分之二十)
AdjustSteeringWheelHeight: Adjust steering wheel height (方向盘调高/调低+一点/百分之二十)
AdjustSunroofAbsoluteValue: Adjust sunroof to 20% (天幕开到百分之二十)
AdjustSunroofAbsoluteValueAbsolute: Adjust sunroof absolute value (天窗绝对值调节)
AdjustSunroofExtremeValue: Adjust sunroof to maximum/minimum (天幕开到最大/最小)
AdjustSunroofExtremeValueExtreme: Adjust sunroof extreme value (天窗极值调节)
AdjustSunroofRelativeValue: Adjust sunroof opening (天幕开大+一点/百分之二十)
AdjustSunroofRelativeValueRelative: Adjust sunroof relative value (天窗相对值调节)
AdjustSunshadeAbsoluteValue: Adjust sunshade absolute value (控制车辆遮阳帘绝对值调节功能)
AdjustSunshadeExtremeValue: Adjust sunshade to maximum/minimum (遮阳帘开到最大/最小)
AdjustSunshadeRelativeValue: Adjust sunshade opening (遮阳帘开大+一点/百分之二十)
AdjustTopAngle: Adjust overhead screen angle (控制车辆吸顶屏角度调节功能)
AdjustWindDirectionAirConditionerAbsolut: Adjust air conditioner wind direction absolute value (控制车辆空调风向绝对值调节功能)
AdjustWindDirectionAirConditionerMode: Adjust air conditioner wind direction mode (控制车辆空调风向模式调节功能)
AdjustWindowAbsoluteValue: Adjust 【位置】 window absolute value (【位置】车窗绝对值调节)
AdjustWindowExtremeValue: Adjust 【位置】 window extreme value (【位置】车窗极值调节)
AdjustWindowRelativeValue: Adjust 【位置】 window relative value (【位置】车窗相对值调节)
Air: Query air quality (控制车辆车里空气怎么样功能)
AlarmVolume: Set alarm volume to high/medium/low (高中低)
AmbientLight: Open music rhythm ambient light at 【位置】 (【位置】打开音乐律动氛围灯)
Assist: Toggle turn signal lane change assist (控制车辆拨杆变道辅助开关功能)
Assist12: Toggle commute pilot assist (控制车辆通勤领航驾驶辅助功能)
Assist23: Toggle emergency lane keep assist (控制车辆紧急车道保持辅助开关功能)
Assist88: Toggle lane keep emergency assist (控制车辆车道保持紧急辅助功能)
AssistDF: Activate intelligent driving assist (控制车辆激活智能驾驶辅助功能)
Auto: Toggle cruise automatic speed limit (控制车辆巡航自动限速功能)
AutoAuto: Toggle automatic emergency braking (控制车辆自动紧急制动开关功能)
AutoNavigation: Close navigation automatic volume reduction (关闭导航自动降音)
AuxScreen: Close PSD Bluetooth (关闭PSD蓝牙开关)
Backrest: Adjust 【前排/后排/左侧/右侧/全车】 seat backrest forward/backward (【前排/后排/左侧/右侧/全车】座椅靠背往前/往后一点)
BatteryLevel: Toggle low battery auto start generator (开启后，低电量时燃油发电机启动发动机)
ButtonBrightness: Close instrument auto brightness switch (关闭仪表自动切换亮暗)
ButtonSoundEffect: Toggle button sound effect (控制车辆按键音效功能)
CampingSpace: Use classical voice feedback (使用通用语音反馈文言)
Charging: Toggle 【交流/直流】 charging port cover (打开/关闭【交流/直流】二合一充电口盖)
Charging9F: Start charging immediately (立即开始充电)
ChargingReservation: Close charging reservation (关闭预约充电)
ChargingSlowCharging: Set AC charging current limit to 【目标值】 (交流充电电流限值调到【目标值】)
ChargingStatusIndicator: Close charging status indicator (关闭充电状态指示灯)
ChildLock: Unlock child lock (解锁=开锁=关闭上锁=关闭锁)
Close: Close function (控制车辆关闭功能)
Close26: Close negative ion window close reminder (控制车辆关闭负离子关窗提醒功能)
Close2DWholeVehicleSoundEffectSurroundSo: Close 2D surround/whole vehicle immersive surround sound (关闭2D环绕音/全车沉浸环绕音效)
Close40: Close CarPlay (控制车辆关闭carplay功能)
Close6A: Close waltz turn (关闭华尔兹调头)
Close74: Close emergency recording (控制车辆关闭紧急录制功能)
Close9E: Close 【位置】 camera (控制车辆关闭【位置】相机功能)
CloseA6: Close microphone (控制车辆关闭麦克风功能)
CloseAI: Close AI temperature control (控制车辆关闭AI控温功能)
CloseAirConditioner: Close 【音区】 air conditioner (控制车辆关闭【音区】空调功能)
CloseAirConditionerAC: Close 【音区】 air conditioner AC (控制车辆关闭【音区】空调AC功能)
CloseAirConditionerBA: Close 【音区】 air conditioner AUTO (控制车辆关闭【音区】空调AUTO功能)
CloseAirConditionerDefrost: Close air conditioner defrost (控制车辆关闭空调除霜功能)
CloseAirConditionerMode: Close air conditioner AUTO mode (控制车辆关闭空调AUTO模式功能)
CloseAirConditionerMode3C: Close air conditioner heating mode (控制车辆关闭空调制热模式功能)
CloseAirConditionerModeB7: Close air conditioner economy mode (控制车辆关闭空调经济模式功能)
CloseAirConditionerModeCooling: Close air conditioner cooling mode (控制车辆关闭空调制冷模式功能)
CloseAirConditionerModeECO: Close air conditioner ECO mode (控制车辆关闭空调ECO模式功能)
CloseAirConditionerSettings: Close second row air conditioner settings (关闭二排空调设置)
CloseAutoAirConditioner: Close air conditioner auto circulation (控制车辆关闭空调自动循环功能)
CloseAutoAirConditionerAntiFog: Close air conditioner auto anti-fog (控制车辆关闭空调自动防起雾功能)
CloseAutoDefogDefrost: Close auto defog/defrost (控制车辆关闭自动除霜除雾功能)
CloseAutoLockVehicle: Toggle rear screen auto close on lock (打开/关闭后排屏锁车自动关闭功能)
CloseAutoPurificationAir: Close PM2.5 auto purification reminder (控制车辆关闭PM2.5空气自动净化提醒功能)
CloseC9: Close Jilu同行 (控制车辆关闭吉路同行功能)
CloseCinemaMode: Cinema mode closed (影院模式已关闭)
CloseCooling: Close 【音区】 rapid cooling (控制车辆关闭【音区】极速降温功能)
CloseDriving: Close dash cam [switch] (控制车辆关闭行车记录仪[开关]功能)
CloseFragrance: Close fragrance (控制车辆关闭香氛功能)
CloseFrontAirConditionerDefog: Close front air conditioner defog (控制车辆关闭空调前除雾功能)
CloseFrontAirConditionerDefrost: Close front air conditioner defrost (控制车辆关闭空调前除霜功能)
CloseGoddessMode: Goddess mode closed (女神模式已关闭)
CloseHeating: Close 【音区】 rapid heating (控制车辆关闭【音区】极速升温功能)
CloseHotspot: Close hotspot (控制车辆关闭车载热点功能)
CloseInnerAirConditioner: Close air conditioner inner circulation (控制车辆关闭空调内循环功能)
CloseMain: Close active seatbelt (将主动式安全带设置项开关关闭)
CloseOuterAirConditioner: Close air conditioner outer circulation (控制车辆关闭空调外循环功能)
ClosePurificationModeAir: Close air purification mode (控制车辆关闭空气净化模式功能)
CloseRearAirConditionerDefog: Close rear air conditioner defog (控制车辆关闭空调后除雾功能)
CloseRearAirConditionerDefrost: Close rear air conditioner defrost (控制车辆关闭空调后除霜功能)
CloseRearDefogHeat: Close rear window electric heating defog (控制车辆关闭后窗电加热除雾功能)
CloseRearRowAirConditioner: Close safety and service settings (关闭安全与服务设置)
CloseRearRowAutoLockVehicle: Toggle rear screen auto close on vehicle lock (打开/关闭锁车自动关闭后排屏)
CloseSentryMode: Close sentry mode (关闭哨兵模式)
CloseSideMirrorDefogHeat: Close side mirror heating defog (控制车辆关闭后视镜加热除雾功能)
CloseSuspension: Close suspension easy loading (控制车辆关闭悬架方便装载功能)
CloseSuspensionMode: Close suspension easy loading mode (控制车辆关闭悬架轻松载物模式功能)
CloseSuspensionPauseMiddle: Pause/Continue close suspension easy loading (控制车辆中途暂停/继续关闭悬架方便装载功能)
CloseSyncAirConditionerTemperature: Close air conditioner temperature sync (控制车辆关闭空调温度同步功能)
CloseWiFi: Close Wi-Fi (控制车辆关闭Wi-Fi功能)
CloseWirelessCharging: Close wireless charging (关闭手机无线充电)
CloudPagePhotoAlbum: Close cloud photo album page (关闭云端图册页面)
ConnectFragrance: Disconnect fragrance device (控制车辆断开连接香氛设备功能)
ConnectFragranceCE: Connect fragrance device (控制车辆连接香氛设备功能)
Control: Toggle tech belt light (打开/关闭科技带灯)
Control47: Close comfortable parking (关闭舒适停车)
ControlApproachUnlock: Toggle approach unlock (打开/关闭近车解锁)
ControlAutoFront: Toggle front combination light/external light/headlight (前组合灯/外部灯光/大灯关闭/打开)
ControlAutoLockVehicle: Toggle auto close windows on lock (打开/关闭锁车自动关窗)
ControlAutoParking: Close auto hold (关闭自动驻车)
ControlAutoParkingAuto: Toggle auto unlock on park (打开/关闭驻车自动解锁)
ControlESCSystem: Close ESC system (关闭ESC车身稳定系统)
ControlFogLightRear: Close rear fog light (关闭后雾灯)
ControlGesture: Toggle second row entertainment screen gesture control (打开/关闭二排娱乐屏手势控制功能)
ControlMode: Set door handle unlock mode to driver only/whole vehicle (门把手感应解锁模式设置为仅主驾/整车)
ControlModeBB: Set remote unlock mode to driver only/whole vehicle (遥控解锁模式设置为仅主驾/整车)
ControlParking: Close electronic parking (关闭电子驻车)
ControlReadingLight: Close reading lights (关闭主驾、副驾、二排左、二排右、三排/后排左、三排/后排右的阅读灯（根据实车配置）)
ControlUp: Toggle leave vehicle lock (打开/关闭离车上锁)
ControlVehicleLocatingMode: Set vehicle locating mode to flash/horn+flash (寻车模式设置为闪灯/鸣笛+闪灯)
CrabWalkMode: Close crab walk mode (关闭蟹行模式)
CurrentAirConditionerTemperature: Query current air conditioner temperature (目前空调多少度/车里多少度)
CurrentFragrance: Query current fragrance remaining (控制车辆当前香氛余量多少功能)
CurrentInner: Query current interior PM2.5 value (控制车辆当前车内PM2.5值多少功能)
DOWWarning: Toggle DOW warning (控制车辆DOW开门预警开关功能)
Details: View maintenance details (控制车辆查看保养项目详情功能)
Discharge: Close discharge range protection (关闭放电综合里程保护)
Disconnect: Disconnect CarPlay (控制车辆断开carplay功能)
Display: Set pure electric range display to CLTC mode (设置纯电续航里程显示为CLTC模式)
DisplayMode: Set display theme to night/auto/custom/sunrise/sunset (将车辆显示主题设置为夜晚/自动/自定义/日出/日落)
Door: Toggle door lock (控制车辆车门锁开关功能)
DoorCurrent: Set touch door handle unlock to current door (将触摸门把手解锁功能设置项设为当前车门)
DoorMain: Toggle driver door unlock only (打开/关闭仅主驾车门解锁)
DoorWholeVehicle: Set touch door handle unlock to whole vehicle (将触摸门把手解锁功能设置项设为全车车门)
Down: Take photo (控制车辆帮我拍照一下/拍照/拍张照/普通拍照/我要拍照/再来一张功能)
DownDown: Place whole vehicle maintenance order (控制车辆整车保养下单功能)
DownDown2E: Toggle stay powered on when leaving vehicle (打开/关闭离车不下电)
DownFragrance: Switch to next fragrance (控制车辆下一个香氛功能)
DownRescue: Place rescue order (控制车辆救援下单功能)
DownReservation: Place reservation order (控制车辆预约下单功能)
Driving: Daytime running tail light (控制车辆日间行车尾灯功能)
Driving2D: Close driving power retention (关闭行车保电)
DryingAirConditionerLockVehicle: Toggle air conditioner auto drying on lock (控制车辆锁车空调自干燥功能)
EarphoneBluetoothVolume: Close Bluetooth earphone sound (关闭蓝牙耳机声音)
Entertainment: Toggle second row entertainment screen collision reminder (打开/关闭二排娱乐屏防碰撞提醒功能)
Equalizer: Set equalizer to pop (均衡器音效调为流行)
FarewellPage: Close farewell light effect page (关闭欢送灯效页面)
Fragrance: Purchase fragrance device (控制车辆购买香氛设备功能)
Fragrance23: Switch fragrance scent (控制车辆香氛换一种香味功能)
FragranceDuration: Set fragrance duration to 30/60/90/120 minutes (控制车辆香氛开启时长设为30/60/90/120分钟功能)
Front: Toggle front vehicle departure reminder (控制车辆前车驶离提醒开关功能)
FrontDown: Take front photo (控制车辆拍下前面照片功能)
FrontDownFront: Take front video (控制车辆拍下前面视频功能)
FrontFront: Front position light follows daytime running light (同（前位置灯跟随日行灯点亮）功能)
FrontRowAirConditioner: Toggle front row air conditioner AUTO (控制车辆前排空调AUTO功能)
FrontRowAirConditionerAC: Toggle front row air conditioner AC (控制车辆前排空调AC功能)
FrontWarning: Toggle front collision warning (控制车辆前碰撞预警开关功能)
FullChargeChargingReservation: Set to full charge (设置为充满电)
Gesture: Open gesture tutorial (打开手势教学引导)
Glass: Clean front/rear windshield with washer fluid (前/后挡风玻璃，用玻璃水进行清洗，无方向默认前挡风玻璃)
HUDHUD: Toggle HUD (打开/关闭+HUD/抬头显示)
HeadrestAudio: Close headrest audio smart switch (关闭头枕音响智能切换)
HeadrestBrightness: Adjust 【passenger headrest screen brightness lower 30%】 (把【副驾头枕屏亮度调低 30%】)
HelpMiddleVoice: Close voice help center (关闭语音帮助中心)
Inner: Take interior photo (控制车辆车内照片拍照功能)
InnerInner: Record interior video (控制车辆车内风景录像功能)
LargeBedMode: Toggle 【front row/rear row/whole vehicle】 bed mode (打开/关闭+前排/后排/全车大床模式)
LeftDown: Take left photo (控制车辆拍下左边照片功能)
LeftDownLeft: Take left video (控制车辆拍下左边视频功能)
LegRest: Adjust 【前排/后排/左侧/右侧/全车】 seat leg rest forward/backward (【前排/后排/左侧/右侧/全车】座椅腿托往前/往后一点)
ListApplication: Close app list (关闭应用列表)
LowerVolume: Toggle lower media volume on door open (打开/关闭开门降低媒体音量)
LumbarSupport: Adjust 【前排/后排/左侧/右侧/全车】 seat lumbar support up/down (【前排/后排/左侧/右侧/全车】座椅腰托调高/调低一点)
LyricsDisplay: Toggle HUD lyrics display (打开/关闭HUD的歌词显示)
MainMain: Set display theme to day (将车辆显示主题设置为白天)
Memory: Start memory route (控制车辆开始记忆路线功能)
Memory0A: Memory parking exam (控制车辆记忆泊车考试功能)
Memory47: Toggle memory parking (控制车辆记忆泊车功能)
Middle: Close central lock (将中控锁设置项开关关闭)
MiddleScreenBrightness: Close central screen auto brightness (关闭中控自动调节亮度)
Mode: Set recording to mute mode (控制车辆录像时设为静音模式功能)
ModeB8: Toggle 【位置】 breathable mode (【位置】透气模式开关)
MultimediaSoundEffect: Close multimedia sound effect settings (关闭多媒体音效设置)
MultimediaVolume: Close multimedia sound (关闭多媒体声音)

SetCorneringLight: Close cornering light (关闭弯道照明灯)
SetDesktopPreference: Close desktop preference (关闭桌面偏好)
SetDischarge: Set discharge type to V2L (设置放电类型为V2L)
SetDoorOpenVolumeLower: Set door open volume lower (控制车辆开门压低媒体音功能)
SetDriverDetection: Toggle driver detection (控制车辆驾驶员状态检测功能)
SetDriverMonitoring: Toggle driver monitoring (控制车辆驾驶员状态监测开关功能)
SetEnergyConsumptionCurve: Switch energy consumption curve to year (能耗曲线切换为年)
SetEnergyManagement: Toggle energy management (打开/关闭能量管理)
SetEntertainment: Toggle | second row entertainment screen adjustment/settings page (打开|关闭二排娱乐屏调节/设置页)
SetExtremeRangeMode: Close extreme range mode (关闭极致续航)
SetFaultDiagnosis: Initiate fault diagnosis (控制车辆发起故障诊断功能)
SetFrontWarning: Set front collision warning timing (控制车辆前碰撞预警时机设置功能)
SetGeelyLifeMode: Toggle Geely life mode (控制车辆吉利美好生活功能)
SetHUDMode: Set HUD to AR/minimal/2D/3D/map/multi-lane (HUD设置为AR/极简/2D/3D/地图/多车道)
SetHillDescentControl: Close hill descent control (关闭陡坡缓降)
SetMapView: Toggle map view (打开/关闭地图视图)
SetMileageStatistics: Toggle mileage statistics (打开/关闭里程统计)
SetMode: Set speed limit recognition reminder mode (控制车辆设置限速信息识别提醒模式功能)
SetModeAssist: Set LCA lane change assist mode (控制车辆设置LCA变道辅助模式功能)
SetModeWarning: Set lane departure warning mode (控制车辆设置车道偏离预警模式功能)
SetMusicRhythm: Close tech belt music rhythm (关闭科技带音乐随动(音乐律动))
SetParkingReset: Close parking reset (关闭停车重置)
SetPowerMileageProtection: Close power mileage protection (关闭供电里程保护)
SetPowerOutlet: Close power outlet (关闭电源插座)
SetPrivacyMode: Close privacy mode settings (关闭隐私模式设置)
SetRearRow: Toggle | rear screen adjustment/settings page (打开|关闭后排屏调节/设置页)
SetRemoteParking: Remote parking (控制车辆远程挪车功能)
SetSafetyEnhancement: Toggle safety enhancement (控制车辆安全及体验提升功能)
SetSeat: Set passenger seat easy entry to off/exit only/exit+entry (副驾座椅方便进出设为关闭/仅离车/离车+上车)
SetSideMirrorPage: Toggle side mirror settings page (打开/关闭后视镜设置页面)
SetSmartReminder: Toggle smart reminder (控制车辆智能提醒开关功能)
SetSpeedLimitRecognition: Toggle speed limit recognition (控制车辆限速信息识别开关功能)
SetSunroofSunroof: Toggle sunroof settings page (打开/关闭天窗天幕设置页)
SetSunshadeSunroof: Toggle sunshade settings page (打开/关闭天窗遮阳帘设置页)
SetSuperRangeMode: Close super range mode (关闭超级续航)
SetSuspension: Set suspension damping (控制车辆设定悬架阻尼功能)
SetSuspensionCF: Open comfort suspension/open sport suspension (打开舒适悬架/打开运动悬架)
SetSuspensionHeight: Set suspension height (控制车辆设定悬架高度功能)
SetTimeFormat: Set time format to 12-hour (将时间设置为十二小时制)
SetTrafficLightSoundAlert: Toggle traffic light sound alert (控制车辆交通灯声音提醒功能)
SetVectorManeuver: Close vector maneuver (关闭矢量机动)
SetVehicleMaintenanceCheck: Vehicle maintenance check (控制车辆整车保养检测功能)
SetVehiclePowerSupply: Close vehicle power supply (关闭对车供电)
SetVictoryMode: Toggle victory mode (控制车辆大吉大利功能)
SetVoicePrint: Close voice print settings (关闭声纹设置)
SetVolumeBalance: Set volume balance to -10 (将音量平衡设置为-10)
SetWakeUp: Close wake word settings (关闭唤醒词设置)
SetWiperControl: Default front wiper when direction not specified (用户指令中未指定方位时，默认前雨刮)
SideMirrorAutoInner: Toggle inner rear mirror auto anti-glare (打开/关闭内后视镜自动防眩目)
SideMirrorDown: Set reverse mirror tilt to xx (倒车后视镜下翻设为xx)
SideMirrorFold: Fold/unfold side mirror (后视镜折叠/展开)
SideMirrorFoldLockVehicle: Toggle side mirror fold on lock (打开/关闭锁车时后视镜折叠)
SideMirrorOuter: Toggle side mirror tilt on reverse (打开/关闭倒车时外后视镜倾斜)
SideMirrorStreaming: Toggle streaming rear mirror (打开/关闭流媒体后视镜)
SmallWindowMode: Toggle small window mode (控制车辆小窗模式功能)
SnowMode: Toggle snow mode (打开/关闭雪地模式)
SoundEffect: Play tiger/lion/cat/whistle/hawker/super engine/tractor/old village chief sound (播放老虎声/狮子声/猫咪声/口哨声/叫卖声/超跑引擎/拖拉机/老村长)
SoundEffect9C: Toggle smart sound effect (打开/关闭智能音效)
SteeringWheel: Close steering wheel assist settings (关闭方向盘助力设置)
SteeringWheelButton: Toggle steering wheel button custom page (打开/关闭方向盘按键自定义页)
SteeringWheelHeat: Toggle steering wheel heating (打开/关闭方向盘加热)
SteeringWheelPause: Pause moving steering wheel (暂停移动方向盘)
SteeringWheelTemperature: Open steering wheel temperature settings (打开方向盘温度设置)
Sunroof: Open | close sunroof (打开|关闭天窗)
SunroofTiltUp: Tilt sunroof up (天窗翘起+一点)
Sunshade: Open/close sunshade (打开/关闭(遮阳帘|天窗遮阳帘|滑动天窗遮阳帘|全景式滑动天窗遮阳帘))
SuspensionOneKey: Suspension one-key leveling (控制车辆悬架一键调平功能)
SwitchAnyVoice: Switch to Mandarin mode (切换为普通话模式)
SwitchBluetoothBluetoothPhone: Limited to Bluetooth phone (限定蓝牙电话中可切换)
SwitchFragrance: Switch fragrance to Xth (控制车辆香氛切换为第X个功能)
SwitchParkingAirConditionerMode: Switch parking air conditioner mode (控制车辆驻车空调模式切换功能)
SwitchRearWarning: Switch rear cross traffic warning mode (控制车辆后方横向来车预警提醒方式切换功能)
SwitchSoundEffectMode: Toggle driving mode switch sound effect (打开/关闭驾驶模式切换音效)
SwitchWarning: Switch lane change warning mode (控制车辆变道安全预警方式切换功能)
SwitchWarning75: Switch lane departure warning mode (控制车辆车道偏离预警方式切换功能)
TargetCharging: Adjust target charging lower (将目标充电量调低一点)
ToggleRearDoor: Open/close ground door (打开/关闭地门)
ToggleSunroof: Open/close sky door (打开/关闭天门)
TouchScreenSound: Close touch screen sound (关闭触摸屏声音)
TravelReservation: Close cabin comfort (关闭座舱舒适)
TrunkRearHeight: Set trunk opening height to 60%/70%/80%90%100% (后备箱开启高度设置为 60%/70%/80%90%100%)
UpChildLock: Lock 【音区】 child lock (控制车辆锁上【音区】儿童锁功能)
UpFragrance: Switch to previous fragrance (控制车辆上一个香氛功能)
UpUpUpChildLock: Lock 【左后/二排左侧】 child lock (控制车辆锁上/上锁/关上【左后/二排左侧】儿童锁功能)
V2LDischarge: Set discharge type to V2V (设置放电类型为V2V)
VoiceDrawing: Convert voice command to text and pass to AI album to generate image (通过语音指令"我要画……"将语音指令内容转化成文字透传给AI相册，通过AI相册算法解析生成图像)
VoiceScreenDrawingGestureImage: Convert voice command to text and pass to AI graffiti to generate image (AI涂鸦使用过程中，在手势/屏幕涂鸦完成后的语音录入页将语音指令内容转化成文字透传给AI涂鸦，通过AI涂鸦算法解析生成图像)
Volume: Toggle speed compensated volume (控制车辆音量随车速补偿功能)
VolumeVoice: Close voice sound (关闭语音声音)
Warning: Toggle lane departure warning (控制车辆车道偏离预警开关功能)
WelcomeOuter: Close external welcome light (关闭车外迎宾灯)
WelcomePage: Close welcome light effect page (关闭迎宾灯效页面)
WholeVehicleLight: Toggle whole vehicle lights/all lights (打开/关闭全车灯光/车辆所有灯光)
WindowMultiple: Execute multiple window open operations (执行多个车窗开启操作)
WirelessCharging: Close 【位置】 wireless charging (【位置】关闭无线充电)
